title: Modeling CAR-T cell therapy on-chip
summary: Researchers demonstrate an organ-on-a-chip platform for modeling CAR-T cell therapy, enabling in vitro visualization and assessment of vascularized tumor responses. This microphysiological system provides a predictive preclinical model for evaluating CAR-T efficacy and tumor-immune interactions before clinical deployment.

title: A framework for building a synthetic cell
summary: The SynCell Asia Initiative outlines a strategy to overcome decades-old bottlenecks in building living cells from scratch by orchestrating the spatiotemporal integration of core functional modules. The approach centers on establishing a centralized, AI-driven biofoundry to develop and assemble synthetic cell components.

title: Next-gen cryo promises transplant surgeons more time
summary: Sub-zero cryopreservation technologies are reducing ice damage in donor organs, significantly extending the shelf life of donor-graft pairs. This advancement gives transplant centers more flexibility to match recipients and logistics planning for organ allocation.
